description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features a large open patio area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an outdoor seating area shaded by an umbrella. The front of the bungalow has a driveway with a parked car and is surrounded by several palm trees, giving it a contemporary, resort-like feel. Large sliding glass doors open onto the pool area, providing seamless indoor-outdoor living. The exterior is finished in light, neutral colors, with clean lines and a simple geometric form. The property is enclosed by a paved area and landscaped with sparse vegetation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open patio, pool, and minimalist landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, patio, outdoor seating, and umbrella.
description_view_2: Poolside view with sun loungers, large sliding doors, and palm trees.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway, car, and the full length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors facing the patio
